description: A photograph depicting an expansive heathland or moorland landscape in Stornärfjället, Dalarna, Sweden. The foreground and midground are dominated by low-growing, light yellow-white vegetation, likely lichen or dry moss, intermixed with patches of darker green, herbaceous plants or dwarf shrubs. The terrain shows gentle undulations. In the hazy background, distant hills or mountains are visible. The caption below the image reads: "Stornärfjället, Dalarna (Sweden). Credit: Sebastian Kirppu". This image exemplifies the land cover class 5.1.0.0 Heathland and Moorland as defined in the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) guidelines.
